title: fragaria monspeliensis
intro: Fragaria monspeliensis, commonly known as the Provence strawberry or woodland strawberry, is a species of strawberry native to Europe. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and improve immune function. The health benefits of Fragaria monspeliensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies and supplements. Fragaria monspeliensis can be consumed as a fresh fruit, used in teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is also used in herbal preparations such as capsules and powders.
